query_normalized: climate-smart agricultural practices in rural areas to improve food security agriculture
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the core dependent variable (crop yield) and the underlying mechanism (interaction between weather/soil variables) within the specific domain of smallholder farmers, which is the primary target population for "Climate-Smart Agricultural Practices" aimed at improving food security.
